# arifOS Knowledge Index — MASTER

This file is the canonical entry point for all agents working in this VPS. Refer to these sources before any implementation.

## 1. Protocol & Library Standards (The Rules)
- [MCP Specification](/docs/knowledge/mcp_protocol_llms.txt) — Official Model Context Protocol.
- [FastMCP Implementation](/docs/knowledge/fastmcp_llms.txt) — Python-specific implementation docs.
- [OpenAI Libraries](/docs/knowledge/openai_llms.txt) — Python & JS SDK documentation.
- [OpenClaw / ACP](/docs/knowledge/openclaw_llms.txt) — Agent Control Protocol & Gateway docs.
- [AGI Frameworks](/docs/knowledge/agi_knowledge_llms.txt) — PydanticAI, CrewAI, LangChain, LlamaIndex context.

## 2. Kernel Context (The Brain)
- [/arifosmcp/](/arifosmcp/) — Constitutional governance logic.
- [Architecture Plan](/arifOS_HORIZON_ARCHITECTURE.md) — The Phase 2 roadmap.

## 3. Organ Intelligence (The Senses)
- [/organs/geox/llms.txt](/organs/geox/llms.txt) — Geoscience Intelligence.
- [/organs/wealth/llms.txt](/organs/wealth/llms.txt) — Capital Intelligence.
- [/organs/well/](/organs/well/) — Biological Substrate.

## 4. Control Plane (The Will)
- **AAA Repository** — Refer to `/root/AAA/` (when cloned) for OpenClaw bridge logic and agent skills.

*DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI — 999 SEAL ALIVE*
